name: Mianyang Fulin Precision Machining Co., Ltd.
summary: Mianyang Fulin Precision Machining Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells automotive engine parts. Its products include hydraulic tappets, mechanical valve tappets, hydraulic tensioners, rocker arms, hydraulic automatic tensers, valve rockers, variable valve systems, nozzles, variable valve actuation systems, direct injection systems, VVT and OCV products, piston cooling jets, auto-tensioners, and high precision machining parts, as well as precise components of automatic transmission and fuel injectors. The company manufactures lithium-ion battery cathode materials. Mianyang Fulin Precision Machining Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Mianyang, China.
